features: POWERFUL UP TO 100% LIMSCALE REMOVAL: Duzzit Appliance Descaler is specially formulated to remove 100% of limescale build-up, ensuring your appliances stay in peak condition. Its citric acid formula provides a thorough clean, restoring performance and extending the lifespan of your household essentials.

CONVENIENT DROP-IN SACHETS: No need for complex steps or messy powders—just drop in a sachet and let it work! (Please refer to packaging instructions for each appliance). These easy-to-use, pre-measured sachets provide precise descaling with minimal effort, saving you time and hassle while delivering powerful results.

IDEAL FOR MULTIPLE APPLIANCES: Designed to work effectively on kettles, coffee machines, steam irons, and shower heads, this versatile descaler kit is a one-stop solution for limescale removal. Simply choose your appliance, drop in a sachet, and experience the difference.

ENHANCES APPLIANCE EFFICIENCY: Limescale can clog heating elements, leading to longer heating times and increased energy use. Duzzit’s limescale remover keeps appliances running smoothly and efficiently, helping reduce energy costs and extend appliance life.

ESSENTIAL FOR HARD WATER AREAS: Living in a hard water area? Duzzit Appliance Descaler provides essential maintenance to prevent limescale build-up. Use regularly to protect your appliances, maintaining their performance and longevity.

QUICK ACTION FORMULA: Each sachet works in just 10 minutes, giving you a fast, powerful clean without the wait. Perfect for busy households, this quick-action descaler fits seamlessly into your cleaning routine, delivering spotless appliances in record time.

PROLONGS APPLIANCE LIFE: Regular descaling with Duzzit helps prevent costly repairs and replacements. By removing limescale, you can protect your appliances’ inner components, keeping them running longer and more reliably.

SAFE AND EFFECTIVE INGREDIENTS: Duzzit uses safe, effective citric acid to gently dissolve limescale without harming your appliances. It’s a gentle yet powerful way to clean, free from harsh chemicals and suitable for frequent use on a range of appliances.

COMPACT 2 PACK FOR REGULAR MAINTENANCE: With two sachets in each pack, this descaler kit offers an affordable and convenient way to maintain your appliances. Use one sachet per appliance every few months to keep them running at their best.

PERFECT ADDITION TO ANY CLEANING ARSENAL: Duzzit Appliance Descaler is a must-have kitchen cleaner and household essential. It’s ideal for anyone who wants to keep their appliances hygienic, efficient, and performing like new—all without the hassle.
description: Product Description Duzzit Appliance Descaler is suitable for most small household appliances, steam irons, kettles and coffee machines, you can also remove a shower head, place in a suitable container and use a sachet with 1 litre of hot water to clean limescale away. Formulated to remove 100 Percentof all limescale, prolonging the appliance life. Pack of 2 sachets Ingredients Contains: Citric Acid Anhydrous CAS No 77-92-9 Directions Kettles: * Fill the kettle half way with water and allow to boil. * Unplug the kettle and add 1 sachet. * Leave for 10 minutes to work * Empty kettle and rinse thoroughly before use. Coffee Machines: * Half fill the water reservoir * Add 1 sachet * Turn on the machine and allow to filter through Steam Iron: * Turn on the iron and when hot turn off. * Add 1 sachet to the water reservoir and top up with water * Set the iron to steam function, leave the iron off. * Allow the water in the reservoir to drain through the iron into a sink Shower Head: * Remove the shower head and place in a suitable container * Add 1 sachet and 1 litre of hot water * Allow to soak for 10 minutes * Replace the shower head and turn shower on full power to clear To keep your appliances performing as they should, treat them once every 3 months in hard water areas, and once every 6 months in soft water areas. See more
